text: It would be great if the app had a dark mode option for nighttime use.
The battery life on this phone is absolutely terrible. It barely lasts half a day.
I suggest adding more vegetarian options to the menu, as the current selection is quite limited.
The hotel room was clean and the bed was comfortable. We had a pleasant stay overall.
They should really consider extending their customer service hours to include weekends.
I love the design of this product. The build quality feels premium and solid.
The developers need to fix the login bug that keeps logging users out randomly.
Shipping took about 5 business days, which is what was promised on the website.
A better approach would be to allow users to customize the notification settings individually.
The coffee here is amazing and the atmosphere is cozy. Perfect spot for working remotely.
